====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
Marnie debuted in ''[[JN099|Battling Turned Up to Eleven!]]'', where she was revealed to be {{Ash}}'s next opponent in the [[World Coronation Series]]. According to [[Piers]], she was hoping to use her success in the competition to help her dilapidated hometown, [[Spikemuth]], to gain more popularity. While she ended up losing the battle with Ash, the audience was still impressed by her battle skills, causing many to become interested in visiting Spikemuth, much to Marnie's delight.

In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Marnie watched Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}}.
